name.en: Request a TGT with a Certificate

description.zh: 证书请求 TGT仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。
description.en: Request a TGT with a Certificate is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

review.rationale: 原卡片只包含 Certipy 与 Rubeus 调用，没有独立协议载荷；枚举、证书请求和证书认证统一迁入工具手册。
ESC1 条目是 Certipy 枚举、请求和认证命令序列；当前语法与证据边界由 Certipy 工具卡统一维护。

name.zh: 请求 ESC2 测试证书

description.zh: 请求 ESC2 测试证书仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。
description.en: Request an ESC2 Lab Certificate is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

name.zh: 验证 ESC2 证书认证

description.zh: 验证 ESC2 证书认证仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。
description.en: Validate ESC2 Certificate Authentication is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

review.rationale: ESC2 条目完全依赖 Certipy CLI；将 Any Purpose/SubCA 模板验证与测试证书认证迁入 Certipy。

description.zh: 代表测试身份请求证书仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。
description.en: Request a Certificate on Behalf of a Lab Identity is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

review.rationale: ESC3 内容是 Enrollment Agent 的 Certipy 命令手册；代理证书和 on-behalf-of 请求统一进入工具卡。

description.en: Restore the Template Configuration is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

review.rationale: ESC4 内容是 Certipy 模板写权限验证与恢复流程，不是可独立复制的 payload；迁入工具并保留回滚命令。

name.zh: 检查 CA 与模板边界

description.zh: 检查 CA 与模板边界仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。

review.rationale: ESC6 条目只记录 Certipy 参数且沿用旧 -alt 写法；改为当前 -upn 请求语义并迁入 Certipy。

name.zh: AD CS HTTP 中继实验

description.zh: AD CS HTTP 中继实验仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。
description.en: AD CS HTTP Relay Lab is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

targetName.zh: AD CS HTTP 注册端点审计

targetDescription.zh: 对登记的实验 CA 执行有界 HEAD 请求，记录 /certsrv/ 可达性、认证挑战和 TLS 状态，不触发凭据中继。
targetDescription.en: Run a bounded HEAD request against a registered lab CA and record /certsrv/ reachability, authentication challenges, and TLS state without triggering credential relay.

navName.zh: AD CS HTTP 端点审计

description.zh: 检查 /certsrv/ 响应头仅用于隔离的 AD CS 实验域，运行前记录模板、CA、测试身份和回滚点。
description.en: Inspect /certsrv/ Response Headers is limited to an isolated AD CS lab with the template, CA, test identity, and rollback point recorded first.

review.rationale: ESC8 卡片混合 Certipy 枚举、Impacket 中继和 HTTP 端点探测；三种工具职责拆分到各自工具卡。
